Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The time has come for you to wield your power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The tower that you are about to venture into... How did it come to be? For what purpose does it exist?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Regrettably, you are not yet capable of answering these questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}That is why you must be made aware of something before you go any further.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You must understand the nature of your power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The door you just passed through is the entrance to this realm. Of course, no one but you can see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Please, you must understand... It is of the utmost importance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It is like the number zero... Empty, but at the same time holding infinite possibilities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You, my boy, are able to possess multiple Personas and summon them at will.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And when you have defeated your enemies, you will see the faces of possibility before you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}There may be times when they are difficult to grasp... But do not fear. Seize what you have earned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Your power will grow accordingly... Be sure to keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Now, then... My spare time will soon be scarce.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Next time, once again, may you open the door and come here of your own accord.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'll tell you then about my true role... The manner in which I can best assist you.[n]{f 1 1}
